meta_desc: DewSecure focuses on providing high-level smart contract auditing, DeFi security defense, automated vulnerability scanning, and comprehensive on-chain tracking.
placeholder_text: 🚀 Under reconstruction, new features coming soon...
sol_intro_desc: Providing security, compliance solutions, and risk management for your SME or personal websites.
comp_intro_desc: DewSecure is a premier Web3 security platform founded by seasoned industry experts, integrating deep penetration testing, advanced source code auditing, and full-spectrum security solutions. With years of active presence on major bug bounty platforms and extensive involvement in penetration testing and high-level code auditing for numerous projects, DewSecure has amassed deep hands-on expertise. As AI redefines security boundaries and reshapes the global cybersecurity landscape, bringing unprecedented and complex challenges, DewSecure remains steadfast in safeguarding the digital world's line of defense.
disc_intro_desc: Legal compliance and limitation of liability statement for DewSecure security services.
disc_d1: Penetration testing, code auditing, and consulting services provided by DewSecure are intended to help discover and remediate risks. All tests are conducted within the scope of written authorization.
disc_d2: Despite professional techniques, due to evolving attack methods and environmental complexity, we cannot guarantee that tested systems will be absolutely free of vulnerabilities in the future.
disc_d3: Testing may involve access to client systems or networks. DewSecure is not liable for losses caused by third-party products, services, or failure to patch vulnerabilities in time.
disc_d4: Information on this site is for reference only and does not constitute professional legal or technical advice. DewSecure reserves the right to modify content without notice.
disc_d5: Reports, tools, and methodologies generated during the service belong to DewSecure unless otherwise agreed in writing.
disc_d6: To the maximum extent permitted by law, DewSecure is not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use this service.
hero_desc: DewSecure is a premier Web3 security platform built by a team of elite specialists, integrating deep penetration testing, advanced source code auditing, and comprehensive security architecture. Entrust your audits to us to ensure your projects and web ecosystems consistently thrive in a robust, bulletproof environment.
modal_matrix_slogan: Built on technology. Driven by integrity.
modal_subtitle: Enhance your project with a professional Web3 security provider.
form_plh_info: Please introduce your project in detail and Linked (within 2000 words).
form_notice: DewSecure security experts will review your request and contact you as soon as possible.
err_email: Please enter a valid email address
alert_success: Submission successful! The DewSecure team will contact you shortly.
alert_error_email: Please check if the email address is correct.
alert_error_network: Network error, please try again later.
auto_reply_message: Dear Customer, we have received your inquiry. Our team will review it and get back to you shortly. Thank you for your patience.
scan_desc: Enter a website URL to instantly check common security configurations (HTTPS, security headers, etc.)
scan_compliance: By using this tool, you confirm that you have obtained explicit authorization from the target website and agree to the Terms of Service, and you undertake to use it only for compliant security health checks, bearing full legal responsibility for any consequences of the scan.
scan_policy_prefix: Please read and agree to the
scan_network_error: Network error, please try again later
scan_check_rec_https: Migrate your site to HTTPS and enforce encryption for all traffic.
scan_check_rec_hsts: Add the header "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload".
scan_check_rec_x_frame_options: Set "X-Frame-Options: DENY" or "SAMEORIGIN" to prevent clickjacking.
scan_check_rec_x_content_type_options: Add "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff" to prevent MIME sniffing.
scan_check_rec_csp_present_unsafe: CSP is present but contains unsafe directives (unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval). Consider using nonce or hash.
scan_check_rec_csp_missing: Implement a strict CSP policy to restrict resource sources and prevent XSS attacks.
scan_check_rec_permissions_policy: Use Permissions-Policy to limit browser API access.
scan_check_rec_server_info_leak_cdnty: Server header reveals "cloudflare". This is usually normal for a CDN, but ensure the origin server does not leak additional information.
scan_check_rec_server_info_leak_generic: Hide Server/X-Powered-By headers to reduce attack surface.
scan_check_rec_x_permitted_cross_domain: Set "X-Permitted-Cross-Domain-Policies: none" to restrict Adobe cross-domain requests.
scan_check_rec_corp: Set "Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin" to limit cross-origin resource loading.
scan_check_rec_coop: Set "Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin" to isolate cross-origin windows.
scan_check_rec_cache_control: Set appropriate Cache-Control policy, e.g., "no-store, max-age=0" for sensitive pages.
scan_upsell: The above results are based on a standardized baseline audit, designed to give you rapid risk awareness. To ensure thorough remediation and avoid ineffective fixes, we recommend a manual penetration test that considers your business logic. If needed, we can provide tailored remediation guidance to help you go from "finding vulnerabilities" to a fully closed loop of hardening.
modal_subtitle_new:
Transparent pricing, no hidden costs.
DewSecure adheres to standardized delivery. We do not use custom quote tactics to probe your budget. Below are the starting thresholds for our core services, designed to help you quickly determine if we are the right fit for your security budget.
note_deep: Strictly per business flow (1 flow $800, 3 flows $1800)
note_annual: Varies by monitoring frequency and depth tests
